overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player walks along sidewalks, crosses streets, and gazes up at towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and cyan neon trim.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing illuminated billboards and palm trees

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

tall palm tree with textured trunk on the sidewalk
building facade with cyan neon accent lighting
modern illuminated street lamp with vertical light panel

segments.scene_description: Walking along a neon-lit sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing large digital billboards on the left. The street runs parallel on the right with occasional vehicles passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical canyon between skyscrapers looking upward

agents.ego_description: tilting head up to gaze at the towering neon-lit buildings and skybridges

elevated walkway connecting two buildings with cyan neon trim
tall vertical digital billboard with colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers connected by elevated walkways, all illuminated with cyan and magenta neon lights against the night sky.

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the crosswalk and walking across the intersection

waiting at the crosswalk for the light to change

covered walkway or underpass with illuminated storefronts

segments.scene_description: Returning to street level, the camera crosses a multi-lane intersection at the crosswalk. Pedestrians wait at the corner while a futuristic car passes through the intersection.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and advertisements

trimmed green hedge along the sidewalk edge
illuminated shop windows with merchandise displays

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk past buildings covered in bright digital advertisements and storefront displays. The street remains relatively quiet with sparse pedestrian traffic.

agents.ego_description: walking into the plaza approaching the parked motorcycles and billboard

several futuristic motorcycles parked in the plaza

segments.scene_description: Entering an open plaza area dominated by a large Cirrus Cola billboard. Several futuristic motorcycles are parked in the plaza, and a few pedestrians gather near the vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic city, moving from a palm-lined street toward a wide, commercial plaza. It begins by gliding along a sidewalk past large digital billboards and passing vehicles, before the camera tilts upward to reveal a skyline of towering skyscrapers linked by elevated walkways in cyan and magenta. As the view returns to street level, the camera crosses a multi-lane intersection where futuristic cars pass by pedestrians waiting at the corner. The movement continues past storefronts covered in bright digital advertisements before finally opening into a spacious plaza dominated by a massive Cirrus Cola billboard and parked futuristic motorcycles.
